description_zh: 克里斯汀·迪奥（Christian Dior）是法国顶级奢時裝品牌，1946年由克里斯汀·迪奥在巴黎创立。1947年品牌首次发布「新风貌」（New Look）系列——收腰上衣配以宽大及地长裙——彻底颠覆了二战后的时装界，重新定义了女性优雅，震惊全球。迪奥先生的设计以华丽、浪漫和极致的女性化著称，标志性元素包括花朵廓形、蜂腰设计和繁复的刺绣工艺。此后品牌在伊夫·圣罗兰、约翰·加利亚诺、拉夫·西蒙斯和玛丽亚·嘉西亚·基乌里等创意总监的带领下不断演进。如今迪奥隶属LVMH集团，产品线涵盖高级定制服、成衣、皮具、鞋履、珠宝、腕表、香水和彩妆。戴妃包（Lady Dior）和J'adore真我香水等经典作品畅销全球，品牌年营收超60亿欧元，是法国高定精神的杰出代表。

languages.en: Christian Dior is a French luxury fashion house founded in 1946 by Christian Dior in Paris. In 1947, the brand's debut 'New Look' collection — featuring cinched waists and full, floor-length skirts — revolutionized postwar fashion, redefining feminine elegance and stunning the world. Dior's designs are celebrated for their opulence, romance, and ultra-feminine silhouettes, with signature elements including floral shapes, wasp waists, and exquisite embroidery. Under creative directors including Yves Saint Laurent, John Galliano, Raf Simons, and Maria Grazia Chiuri, the brand has continuously evolved. Now part of LVMH, Dior spans haute couture, ready-to-wear, leather goods, shoes, jewelry, watches, fragrances, and cosmetics. Iconic pieces like the Lady Dior bag and J'adore perfume are global bestsellers. With annual revenue exceeding €6 billion, Dior stands as a brilliant representative of French haute couture heritage.
